description: This Java class defines an entity named LoanApplicationDraft for a Spring Boot application using JPA annotations. It models a draft of a loan application, including various fields such as id, userId, data (JSON payload), sectionStatus (JSON), currentStep, status, riskScore, decision, decisionReason, decisionedAt, version (optimistic locking), and timestamps for creation and update. It includes getter and setter methods for each attribute, facilitating persistence and retrieval from a relational database.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraft
classes.description: Entity class representing a draft loan application with fields for data, status, risk assessment, and audit information.

methods.name: getId
methods.description: Returns the UUID identifier of the draft.

methods.name: setId
methods.description: Sets the UUID identifier of the draft.

methods.name: getUserId
methods.description: Returns the UUID of the user associated with the draft.

methods.name: setUserId
methods.description: Sets the UUID of the user associated with the draft.

methods.name: getData
methods.description: Returns the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: setData
methods.description: Sets the JSON payload representing the draft state.

methods.name: getSectionStatus
methods.description: Returns the JSON string mapping section statuses.

methods.name: setSectionStatus
methods.description: Sets the JSON string mapping section statuses.

methods.name: getCurrentStep
methods.description: Returns the current step in the loan application process.

methods.name: setCurrentStep
methods.description: Sets the current step in the loan application process.

methods.name: getStatus
methods.description: Returns the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: setStatus
methods.description: Sets the overall status of the draft.

methods.name: getRiskScore
methods.description: Returns the computed risk score for the draft.

methods.name: setRiskScore
methods.description: Sets the computed risk score for the draft.

methods.name: getDecision
methods.description: Returns the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: setDecision
methods.description: Sets the automated decision outcome.

methods.name: getDecisionReason
methods.description: Returns the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: setDecisionReason
methods.description: Sets the human-readable reason for the decision.

methods.name: getDecisionedAt
methods.description: Returns the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: setDecisionedAt
methods.description: Sets the timestamp when the decision was made.

methods.name: getVersion
methods.description: Returns the optimistic concurrency control version.

methods.name: setVersion
methods.description: Sets the optimistic concurrency control version.

methods.name: getCreatedAt
methods.description: Returns the creation timestamp.

methods.name: setCreatedAt
methods.description: Sets the creation timestamp.

methods.name: getUpdatedAt
methods.description: Returns the last update timestamp.

methods.name: setUpdatedAt
methods.description: Sets the last update timestamp.
